rationale: The cited paper appears only once in a grouped literature-review sentence describing prior work on within-website behavior, specifically studies on demographic, site, and visit characteristics. The citing paper uses this citation to position its own contribution as different (pre-website multichannel touchpoints and attribution), not to build its model, measures, or empirical strategy from Danaher et al. There is no distinct follow-on use of the cited paper in hypothesis development, estimation details, or interpretation of results.
